name: Customer Intake Form
description: Basic customer information collection for demo purposes

fields.label: Full Name
fields.reprompt: I didn't catch that. Could you please say your full name again?

fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.prompt: What is your date of birth?
fields.reprompt: Please say your date of birth, for example, January 15th, 1990.
examples: the fifth of May, nineteen eighty-four

fields.label: Email Address
fields.prompt: What is your email address? You can spell it out.
fields.reprompt: Please spell out your email address, letter by letter.
examples: john dot smith at gmail dot com
jane underscore doe at example dot com

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.reprompt: Please say your phone number, including area code.
examples: one eight hundred five five five one two three four

fields.label: Data Consent
fields.prompt: Do you consent to us storing this information? Please say yes or no.
fields.reprompt: Please confirm: do you consent to data storage? Say yes or no.
